Fit all windows within 600 px height for small Haiku screens

- Reduced ExtractionWindow tips scroll area: 130→70 min, 180→90 max
- Reduced RoastColorWindow thumbnail: 320×240 → 320×180
- Reduced RoastColorWindow tips scroll: 130→70 min, 200→100 max
- Removed unnecessary 40px height buffer from all three windows' ResizeTo() calls
- Updated BRIEF.md to reflect thumbnail size changes and window optimization

All tool windows now fit within 600px total height (content + title bar + borders)
to accommodate smaller Haiku displays.

repository.name: coffee-toolkit
repository.description: A Coffee Toolkit for Haiku OS.

commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add PNG icon build step and update documentation

- set_icon.cpp: Haiku helper that scales toolkit.png to 32×32/16×16,

sections to be invisible. Now uses JS IntersectionObserver with
progressive enhancement.

commit.message:
feat(relay): implement developer-reviewer relay cycle

- PR opened → spawn reviewer agent automatically
- Review approved → resume developer for merge
- Review changes_requested → resume developer or escalate at cycle limit
- PR synchronize → mark dev as waiting-review, spawn new reviewer
- Escalation: label PR, post comment, stop agents
- Add Gitea API: CommentOnPR, AddLabel, GetPRReviews
- Add DeveloperWorkDir to PRTracking
- AgentSpawner interface for testable relay logic
- 5 new tests covering full review cycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: v0.4.0 — force_enable, type_native, find_overlay, bulk_action, session_status

Add 5 new MCP tools addressing browser automation pain points:

- force_enable: remove disabled/readonly/aria-disabled + 3s MutationObserver
  guard to prevent Vue/React from re-disabling the field
- type_native: real keyboard events via page.keyboard.type() + nativeInputValueSetter
  trick for React inputs that ignore fill()
- find_overlay: document.elementsFromPoint() at ref position to diagnose
  which element intercepts pointer events when click() silently fails
- bulk_action: apply click/check/uncheck/evaluate to all elements matching
  a CSS selector — enables mass draft deletion and batch operations
- session_status: domain cookies (name/expiry/secure/httpOnly), localStorage
  and sessionStorage key counts, login heuristic via cookie/key name patterns

Total MCP tools: 30

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Stop install.bat error message from looking like a diagnosis

The generic "Common issues" list included "Microsoft Store Python detected"
which users read as an actual detection, not a suggestion. Dgracey thought
his python.org install was the problem when it was just a missing --force flag.

Now: error box says "read the error above" and points to diagnose.bat.
Success box: simplified, no more listing things that may not apply.

commit.message:
refactor: AI 펫톡 프롬프트 구조 최적화 - GPT-4o-mini 지시 이행률 개선

주요 변경:
- 프롬프트 순서 재배치: 보안 > 정체성 > 규칙 > 컨텍스트 (GPT-4o-mini의 앞/뒤 주의 집중 특성 활용)
- 케어 레퍼런스 압축: HALLUCINATION_GUARD_RULES + CARE_FRAMING_RULES 통합 (~1,800토큰 -> ~500토큰)
- 답변 다양성 규칙 중복 제거: 메인 프롬프트는 핵심만, 상세 패턴은 extractRecentTopics에만
- 컨텍스트 예산 조정: 위기/응급 프롬프트 추가분 감안 (3000 -> 2500자)
- max_tokens 400 -> 500: 응답+SUGGESTIONS+PENDING_TOPIC 잘림 방지
- "모드 B" 용어 제거 (GPT 혼란 방지)
- 시간 에너지 텍스트 축약, 불필요한 예시문 중복 제거

diagnose.py overhaul:
- Check install location (drive root, Program Files, cloud sync, write perms)
- Check GPU/CUDA availability and PyTorch CUDA status
- Check key Python packages (torch, onnxruntime, diffusers, lycoris, etc.)
- Check frontend build state (node_modules, .next, next package)
- Detect venv exists but not activated
- Detect multiple conflicting Python installations
- Smart issue analysis that cross-references all collected data
- Output to logs/ dir instead of polluting project root
- Removed false alarm about __pycache__ being "problematic"
- Fixed installer_linux.py reference (file doesn't exist)

install.bat / start_services_local.bat:
- Point users to 'diagnose.bat' on failure
- Add "don't install to C:\ root" hint in permission error

.gitignore:
- Add diagnostics_*.json, diagnostics_*.txt, .write_test_diagnostic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add retrieval engine, RAG layer, evaluation, and observability (CP3-6)

- query/search.py: Searcher class with FAISS cosine search and confidence threshold filtering
- query/llm_client.py: Ollama/Mistral client with token and latency metrics
- query/rag.py: RAG orchestrator with prompt building, fallback, and query_metrics logging
- evaluation/retrieval_eval.py: P@1, P@3, FragHit@K, MRR metrics over annotated test set
- data/evaluation/test_queries.json: 20 annotated queries (P@1=95%, MRR=0.95)
- config/config.yaml: switch to paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2, add llm: section
- ROADMAP.md, docs/OUT_OF_SCOPE.md: project planning and scope documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(vote): scroll to top on vote creation and prevent button wrap on mobile (#46)

* 🤖 fix(vote): scroll to top on vote creation and prevent button wrap on mobile

- Scroll to top (smooth) after vote session is created so the share
  link is immediately visible without manual scrolling
- Add whiteSpace: nowrap to can/can't attend buttons so bold font
  on selection doesn't cause text to wrap and grow the button height

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* 🤖 fix(vote): scroll containerRef not window (window.scrollTo is no-op in this SPA)

The SPA applies overflow:hidden on html/body/#root/.app-root/.find-mode-root,
so window.scrollTo is silently ignored. The actual scrollable element is
.find-container, already tracked by containerRef.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(fae): fix tool calling, CoWork user context, and UI clutter

- Fix main window tool calling: improve PersonalityManager tool guidance
  to explicitly mandate tool use for calendar/reminders/mail/contacts/notes
  queries, and include compact tool list with descriptions in the system
  prompt even when native tool calling is active (previously ignored)
- Fix ToolRegistry.compactToolSummary to include brief tool descriptions
  instead of just risk levels, so the model understands each tool's purpose
- Fix CoWork external LLMs missing user context: add systemPrompt field to
  CoworkProviderRequest; inject "You are helping <name>." as system message
  for OpenAI-compatible (messages array) and Anthropic (top-level system key)
- Simplify CoWork header: remove standalone refresh and settings icon buttons,
  consolidate into the ellipsis menu (was 7 controls, now 5)
- Simplify CoWork input bar: remove duplicate provider and model pills (already
  shown in header) and read-only compare mode status pill (was 7 pills, now 3)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: fae
repository.description: Fae, your digital companion

commit.message:
feat: signal description strip + Rug Check button rename

- app2.js: add signalDesc() — generates a plain-English one-liner and
  action badge for every card based on signal type + score + isGem:
    Breakout Gem → 🔥  STRONG BUY (red)
    Gem only     → 💎  STRONG BUY (red)
    Strong Break → 🚀  BUY (green)
    Breakout     → 📈  BUY (green)
    Hot Fresh    → ⚡  BUY (green)
    Fresh        → ✦   WATCH (amber)
    Accum ≥70    → 🟢  BUY (green)
    Building ≥50 → 🟡  WATCH (amber)
    Early        → 📊  (no badge)
- app2.js: insert .card-signal-desc strip between fomoAlert and
  coin row — always visible, explains what the signal means
- app2.js: rename "🛡️ Rug" button to "🛡️ Rug Check" to prevent
  users from thinking the coin itself is a rug
- components.css: add .card-signal-desc, .csd-icon, .csd-text,
  .csd-action and all action badge variants

page CTAs now link to /donate instead of /member/login.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Restructure enrichment cascade: cache → LLR → web search

New per-builder contact enrichment flow:
1. Builder cache (instant hit from CHBA directory or prior lookups)
2. SC LLR contractor license database (verify.llronline.com)
3. Web search via DuckDuckGo + website scrape (last resort)

- Add scraper/llr-lookup.js — Puppeteer-based SC contractor license search
  with graceful timeout handling (site goes down frequently)
- LLR results get cached so repeat lookups are instant
- Health check on LLR site at start — skips entirely if down
- Excluded builders no longer waste time on web lookups
- Clean enrichment logging shows source for each builder

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- User review: 5.5→7.5→8.5→8.8, v5 "追平与完善" theme
- PM assessment: v4 plan 17% execution, v6 final roadmap
- v6 RICE Top 10: dynamic font, scroll verification, code split, app icon
- TestFlight readiness: 40% → target 90%+ after v6
